login.heading: Welcome back!
login.subtitle: Log in to your AlfyChat account
login.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our
login.emailUnverifiedDesc: You must verify your email address before logging in. Check your inbox and click the activation link.
login.twoFASubtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app
login.twoFABackupHint: Backup code? Enter your 8 characters above.

register.heading: Create an account
register.subtitle: Join the AlfyChat community
register.inviteDesc: Use the email associated with your invitation.
register.termsPrefix: By creating an account, you agree to our
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.mustAcceptTerms: You must accept the terms of service

forgotPassword.heading: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentDesc: If an account exists with {email}, you will receive a reset link in a few minutes.
forgotPassword.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

resetPassword.heading: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new secure password for your account.
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been reset successfully. You will be redirected to the login page…
resetPassword.invalidLinkDesc: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.invalidLinkShort: Invalid link. Please request a new reset link.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.expiredError: Link invalid or expired. Please request a new link.
resetPassword.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
